channel.title: STF on The R Blog
channel.description: Recent content in STF on The R Blog

item.title: Sovereign Tech Fund Project: Milestone 1
item.description: Sovereign Tech Fund (STF) Project Starting in mid 2025, the R Project has been working on a series of work packages to improve the long-term stability of the R ecosystem. The project is supported by an investment from the Sovereign Tech Agency, under their Sovereign Tech Fund. In a series of blog posts, some details about the achieved results will be shared with the public, starting with Milestone 1. These blog posts are a tribute to the late Tomáš Kalibera, who continued working on this project during his last months.
